title: Gemini SAFETY finish reason swallowed in pipeline handle_google_response
description:
## Severity
Major
## Dimension
error-handling
## Location
src/pipeline.rs:396-504
## Violation
handle_google_response checks for top-level 'error' field but does not check candidate.finishReason. Gemini returns finishReason=SAFETY or RECITATION on filtered output with an empty or partial candidates array. The function returns Ok with empty text — the TUI sees no completion, no error, and the user has no idea why the model 'said nothing'. Compare to GoogleAdapter::transform_response which maps SAFETY → 'content_filter'. Pipeline silently truncates.
## Mandated refactor
After extracting text/tool_calls, inspect candidates[0].finishReason. If MAX_TOKENS, SAFETY, RECITATION, or BLOCKLIST, append a structured warning to text or return Err with a specific FilteredResponse variant. Send AppEvent::ApiError so the user sees a clear failure mode.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
